mapper.insert: INSERT INTO im_user (uid, user_name, password, phone, enabled_flag) VALUES (#{uid}, #{userName}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{enabledFlag})

INSERT INTO im_friend_relation (id, uid, friend_id, user_name, friend_name, relation_status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{uid}, #{friendId}, #{userName}, #{friendName}, #{relationStatus}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
